sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array (id INTEGER, values FLOAT[]);
INSERT INTO test_array (id, values) VALUES (1, array_value(1.0::FLOAT, 2.0::FLOAT, 3.0::FLOAT));
UPDATE test_array SET values = array_value(4.0::FLOAT, 5.0::FLOAT) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, unnest(values) as value FROM test_array;
SELECT id FROM test_array WHERE values[1] > 1.5;
